UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user account information and vehicle details.

uid.description: Unique user ID from Firebase Auth

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the profile was created

MaintenanceLog.title: Maintenance Log
MaintenanceLog.description: Stores vehicle maintenance events and alerts.

uid.description: User ID who owns this log

type.description: Type of maintenance (e.g., Oil Change, Fault Detected)

/users/{uid}/maintenanceLogs/{logId}.description: Subcollection of maintenance logs for a specific user.
